Our Offices

Project Support Office

MENU

Project Support Office (PSO) is the first office established within the Research and Project Development Directorate - ARPROGED in 2011. The PDO unit supports the announcement of calls, the development of ideas for national and international R&D projects of academics and students within the university, the selection of appropriate funds, and the preparation of project application files.
